creator: software@bertram-scharpf.de
text:
It's even worse. In devel/xdg-utils I give the --skip-validate option. Then, there happens the following:

Catalog error : Detected recursion in catalog (null)
Catalog error : Detected recursion in catalog (null)
Catalog error : Detected recursion in catalog (null)
Catalog error : Detected recursion in catalog (null)
... (for minutes, then it succeeds or fails)

The xsltproc tool does not only do not work properly, it further does not tell me what went wrong or even what it tried to do. I strongly recommend to ban this tool from FreeBSD until they learned how to write software.

The attached patch removes every xsltproc call I encountered.
